name: State Change Action
description: Wrap an explicit RobotCellState into a named state-change Action. Drop between trajectory actions in a Cf_ActionChain to record gripper toggles, tool attach/detach, rigid body grasp/release.

inputParameters.name: name
inputParameters.description: Unique name for this state change within the chain (e.g. 'grasp', 'release').

inputParameters.name: post_state
inputParameters.description: RobotCellState describing the cell AFTER the change (e.g. with a tool attached, or a rigid body grasped).

inputParameters.name: tags
inputParameters.description: Optional comma-separated tags driving differentiated downstream execution (e.g. 'grasp'). Stored on the action's attributes.
